tasks.subject: Task 0: Characterization — capture real pdf-parse output
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Capture exactly what pdf-parse emits for the 7-order file and the working single-order file, so split boundary and item-row format are chosen from evidence.

**Files:**
- Create: doodoo/scripts/dump-pdf-text.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Script prints full text + JSON line array for the 7-order file.
- Output confirms blank-line (\n\n) separator between the 7 orders (PAGE-SPLIT CHUNK COUNT: 7).
- Exact item-row line form recorded (smashed 1BS18 / 29.90129.90 vs spaced).

**Verify:** cd doodoo && npx ts-node scripts/dump-pdf-text.ts "<path>/7单.pdf" → 7 page boundaries visible.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["doodoo/scripts/dump-pdf-text.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd doodoo && npx ts-node scripts/dump-pdf-text.ts \"/c/Users/jiaen/Documents/doo-account/7单.pdf\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["prints text + line array", "7 page chunks for 7单.pdf", "item-row form recorded"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: splitIntoOrders() page-splitter
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a private helper splitting one file's raw extracted text into per-order segments on the \n\n page boundary, with a merge-guard for stray blank lines.

**Files:**
- Modify: doodoo/src/invoice/invoice-parser.service.ts (add helper ~line 474)
- Test: doodoo/src/invoice/invoice-parser.service.spec.ts (create)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 3-order text joined by \n\n splits into 3 segments.
- Header-less trailing fragment merged into previous segment.
- Leading empty chunk dropped.

**Verify:** cd doodoo && npx jest invoice-parser.service.spec --silent → splitter tests PASS.

**Steps:** Write 3 failing tests for splitIntoOrders; implement split on /\n{2,}/ with hasHeader merge-guard; run green; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["doodoo/src/invoice/invoice-parser.service.ts", "doodoo/src/invoice/invoice-parser.service.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd doodoo && npx jest invoice-parser.service.spec --silent", "acceptanceCriteria": ["3 orders -> 3 segments", "header-less fragment merged", "single order -> 1 segment"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Template-agnostic header-field regexes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Read customerName/orderNo/date from both templates (名字:/BILL:/DATE: and 收货人：/BILL #/DATE <time> <date>).

**Files:**
- Modify: doodoo/src/invoice/invoice-parser.service.ts:239-248 (name/bill/date) and :476-481 (extractFallbackName)
- Test: doodoo/src/invoice/invoice-parser.service.spec.ts (append)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 收货人： Jackie Loh 电话： ... -> name Jackie Loh (phone excluded).
- 名字: Goh Kah Huat -> Goh Kah Huat (regression).
- BILL #001952 -> 001952; BILL: #000391 -> 000391.
- DATE 02:53:01 16-06-2026 -> 16-06-2026; DATE: 2026-04-22 -> 2026-04-22.

**Verify:** cd doodoo && npx jest invoice-parser.service.spec --silent → field tests PASS.

**Steps:** Add field tests (depend on Task 3 array return); replace 3 field matches with dual-template regexes; extend extractFallbackName; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["doodoo/src/invoice/invoice-parser.service.ts", "doodoo/src/invoice/invoice-parser.service.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd doodoo && npx jest invoice-parser.service.spec --silent", "acceptanceCriteria": ["new template name/bill/date read", "old template regression intact"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: parseMarkerFile returns ParsedInvoice[]
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Split each file into per-order segments, type-detect+parse each, label filename uniquely, return the array — AND rewrite the client item parser to read the new template's smashed single-line rows (the real 'can't read anything' bug, confirmed by Task 0 evidence).

**Files:**
- Modify: doodoo/src/invoice/invoice-parser.service.ts:67-107 (parseMarkerFile + new parseSegment) and :282-387 (parseClientItemLines/resolveClientItem/cleanClientDescription rewrite)
- Test: doodoo/src/invoice/invoice-parser.service.spec.ts (append)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- parseMarkerFile returns Promise<ParsedInvoice[]>.
- 2-order client text yields 2 invoices with own customerName + correct item qty (incl. multi-qty H85 18.00x2=36.00).
- Smashed single-line rows (1BS18黄瓜籽粉 500克29.90129.90), multi-line wrapped rows, special-price (49.0029.00129.00), gift (99.0010.00), and old Goh multi-line form all parse correctly.
- Each order filename unique: base + #orderId.
- Zero-item orders dropped; zero-order file still throws.
- Single-order file returns 1-element array.

**Verify:** cd doodoo && npx jest invoice-parser.service.spec --silent → all parser tests PASS.

**Steps:** Write failing 2-order + 7 item-row tests; rewrite parseMarkerFile (loop splitIntoOrders→parseSegment→filter→label) and parseClientItemLines/resolveClientItem/cleanClientDescription (group by item-start, join, extract trailing (\d+\.\d{2})(\d+)(\d+\.\d{2})$); run green; commit. NOTE: also fold in Task 2's name/bill/date regex changes — the field tests call parseMarkerFile()[0] so they only go green once this task lands.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["doodoo/src/invoice/invoice-parser.service.ts", "doodoo/src/invoice/invoice-parser.service.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd doodoo && npx jest invoice-parser.service.spec --silent", "acceptanceCriteria": ["returns array", "2 orders parsed with names+qty", "smashed single-line rows parsed", "multi-qty/special/gift/Goh forms parsed", "unique per-order filename", "single order -> length 1"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Controller flattens per-file order arrays
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Flatten the now-nested parse results before compare/persist.

**Files:**
- Modify: doodoo/src/invoice/invoice.controller.ts:49-54

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- clientParsed/supplierParsed are flat ParsedInvoice[].
- npm run build compiles with no type errors.

**Verify:** cd doodoo && npm run build → exits 0.

**Steps:** Rename to clientNested/supplierNested, add .flat(); build; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["doodoo/src/invoice/invoice.controller.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd doodoo && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["flat arrays", "build exits 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Per-order-unique file keying in persistence
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Harden line-item role lookup (drop Array.includes) and rely on Task 3's unique filenames so multiple orders from one file don't collide in fileIdMap.

**Files:**
- Modify: doodoo/src/invoice/database.service.ts:95-107

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Each parsed order maps to its own invoice_files row (unique filename key).
- Line-item loop iterates client then supplier explicitly (no clientParsed.includes(inv)).
- npm run build compiles.

**Verify:** cd doodoo && npm run build → exits 0.

**Steps:** Replace combined loop with insertLineItems(invoices, role) called for client then supplier; build; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["doodoo/src/invoice/database.service.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd doodoo && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["explicit role iteration", "unique file keying", "build exits 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: End-to-end verification with the real files
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove against the real PDFs that the multi-order file is fully read and the single-order file is unchanged. Acceptance gate.

**Files:**
- Create (temporary): doodoo/scripts/check-multi-order.ts (deleted after verifying)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 7单.pdf parses to 7 invoices with the 7 expected customer names in order.
- Order #001920 (Tan Sioh Kieow) shows H85 qty = 2 (the only non-1 qty) — proves quantities read.
- Goh #000391 still parses to 1 order with YN137 qty1, BS100 qty1.
- Full unit suite passes: npx jest --silent.

**Verify:** cd doodoo && npx ts-node scripts/check-multi-order.ts → prints OK; npx jest --silent → all green.

**Steps:** Write check script asserting 7 orders + H85 qty2 + single order; run; if item qty wrong, use Task 0 dump to fix parseClientItemLines/resolveClientItem with a real-line test first; run full jest; delete temp script; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["doodoo/scripts/check-multi-order.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd doodoo && npx ts-node scripts/check-multi-order.ts && npx jest --silent", "acceptanceCriteria": ["7单.pdf -> 7 orders, correct names", "H85 qty=2", "Goh -> 1 order unchanged", "full jest green"]}
```
